data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to prevent decision fatigue by limiting options.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes clear, concise navigation and minimalistic designs.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized for speed and ease of interaction.
data.technical_spec: Ensures interactive elements are large enough and positioned intuitively.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs align with user expectations based on their past experiences.
data.technical_spec: Adopts industry-standard design patterns for usability.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic designs are perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Employs visually appealing interfaces with intuitive layouts.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages users to complete tasks by interrupting their process.
data.technical_spec: Uses progress indicators and notifications for incomplete actions.
